name: BreakParGolf
address: 1802 El Camino Real, Redwood City, CA 94063
about: BreakParGolf is a professional golf coaching studio operating in Redwood City and San Carlos, offering data-driven instruction using Trackman and RangeX technology. The facility provides individual lessons, on-course playing sessions, short game clinics, and junior academy programs, with a focus on performance improvement and score reduction. Coaching is available for all skill levels, from competitive juniors to weekend warriors, with an emphasis on personalized guidance using real-time swing and ball flight analytics.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using Trackman for precise swing analysis
Comprehensive post-lesson reports with swing videos and performance metrics
On-course playing lessons for real-game strategy development
Specialized short game and mental performance coaching
Junior academy focused on competitive tournament preparation

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor providing precise swing and ball flight data
Secondary technology available at MySwingStudio location

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Clubs can be provided, though bringing your own is recommended for consistency.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, suggesting it may be BYOB.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not specified as this is primarily a training studio, not a simulator facility.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, with junior golf programs and specific coaching for young players mentioned.
